prompt:
Question: Which of the following passages is the original verbatim passage? The other passages are paraphrased versions of it.

Options:
A. The 76th annual British Academy Film Awards ceremony, often referred to as the BAFTAs, took place on February 19, 2023. This event celebrated the most outstanding domestic and international cinematic achievements of 2022. The venue for the awards was the Royal Festival Hall, situated within the Southbank Centre in London. The British Academy of Film and Television Arts was responsible for presenting these prestigious awards, which recognized the finest full-length films and documentaries, regardless of their country of origin, that had been shown in British cinemas throughout 2022. The list of nominees was unveiled on January 19, 2023, during a worldwide livestream event. Actors Hayley Atwell and Toheeb Jimoh served as hosts for this announcement, which originated from the newly renovated headquarters of the arts charity at 195 Piccadilly, London. The nominees for the EE Rising Star Award, a unique category where the British public casts the votes, were revealed two days earlier, on January 17, 2023. The German-language epic anti-war drama, *All Quiet on the Western Front*, was a significant contender.
B. The 76th British Academy Film Awards, more commonly known as the BAFTAs, were held on 19 February 2023, honouring the best national and foreign films of 2022, at the Royal Festival Hall within London's Southbank Centre. Presented by the British Academy of Film and Television Arts, accolades were handed out for the best feature-length film and documentaries of any nationality that were screened at British cinemas in 2022. The nominations were announced on 19 January 2023 via a global livestream, hosted by actors Hayley Atwell and Toheeb Jimoh, from the arts charity's newly redeveloped HQ at 195 Piccadilly, London. The EE Rising Star Award nominees, which is the only category voted for by the British public, were announced on 17 January 2023.The German-language epic anti-war drama All Quiet
C. The BAFTAs, or the 76th British Academy Film Awards, were held on 19 February 2023 at the Royal Festival Hall in London's Southbank Centre, to celebrate the best national and foreign films of 2022. The award was presented by the British Academy of Film and Television Arts. The nominations were announced on 19 January 2023 via a global livestream, hosted by Hayley Atwell and Toheeb Jimoh, from the arts charity's newly redeveloped HQ at 195 Piccadilly.

Answer:
